economic_notes: First Nation has 14.28% equity interest in UCCMLP (building materials) and 16.66% equity interest in M'Nidoo M'Nising Power Limited Partnership (MMPLP), both accounted for under modified equity method. Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership distributions also held as reserve.
notes: Province is Ontario (Manitoulin Island). Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: UCCMLP (building materials, 14.28% interest) and MMPLP (power, 16.66% interest). Federal funding note 12 shows ISC recognized revenue of $2,118,352 after deferred revenue adjustments, plus CMHC $146,151 and ECCC $139,235 totalling $2,403,738. OSR includes Other revenue $3,725,793, Rental $144,937, Kinoomaadziwin Education Body $792,345 (treated as non-government transfer), and GBE income $17,698. No schedule of remuneration provided. Current liabilities not separately broken out on face of statements shown in text. Segmented expenses show Band and Social Housing combined at $480,288 and Employment and Economic Development at $389,910. Contingent liability of $300,755 related to Robinson Huron Treaty Trust loan guarantee.
